title: AI Fact or Fiction: The Fable Ban, Tokenmaxxing, Saaspocolypse — With Ara Kharazian
summary: Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, discusses whether AI spending by companies is producing real value and whether popular narratives like "tokenmaxing" and the "SaaS apocalypse" are overstated. The conversation covers Anthropic overtaking OpenAI in business adoption, DeepSeek's resurgence, Google's AI position, and whether AI investments are delivering returns.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz hosts Ara Kharazian, lead economist at Ramp, to test whether corporate AI spending is generating real value and whether narratives like "tokenmaxxing" and the "SaaS apocalypse" are overstated. The discussion draws on business adoption data, covering Anthropic overtaking OpenAI among companies, DeepSeek's resurgence, and Google's AI position. The throughline is whether AI investments are delivering returns, separating measurable spending patterns from hype.
